name: JEALOUS HUSBAND 🍠 Amenhotep
description:
Your arranged husband really hates you, but how dare you get a naked massage from your favorite slave?
Now he's jealous as fuck. You're about to be -1 slave.

Your Favorite Slave - Baki:

Backgrounds:

CREATOR'S NOTE

This bot was made to celebrate my very pretty, sweet (but abusive), and hilarious friend So Yeon's birthday. I swear, don't let her appearance trick you — she's filthily funny. But then again, she's real and kind. Plus, she's the person whose aesthetic I like the most. I can't decide if I love her humor or her art skills more. So, Rosie, here's your grumpy husband — just tease the hell out of him. Love you. <3

I know she'll jerk off in my comment section and I can do nothing about it. Don't ask why I said that.

P.S. I swear, this bot took so long because half the time was me rereading the premise and laughing at "-1 slave" lmao. I think my sense of humor is broken.

P.P.S. I didn't know what song to put, so I went with the Egyptian dancing cat song.

P.P.P.S. I think I've found the genre I'm best at: emotionally heavy fantasy/historical bots. Modern ones have been fun, but writing them doesn't satisfy me anymore.
creator: Polangto
